forecast_entity.name: Forecast Entity
forecast_entity.description: A weather.* entity that provides forecast data (e.g. weather.pirateweather). Must have daily forecast attributes.

station_entity.name: Station Entity
station_entity.description: An optional weather.* entity for current conditions from a local weather station (e.g. weather.my_station). Leave empty to use the forecast entity for current conditions too.

radar_enabled.name: Enable Radar Map
radar_enabled.description: Enable or disable the animated radar map GIF served at /radar.gif.

radar_zoom.name: Radar Zoom Level
radar_zoom.description: Map zoom level for the radar view (1 = wide, 7 = close). Default: 6.

radar_smooth.name: Smooth Radar
radar_smooth.description: Apply smoothing to radar tiles for a cleaner look.

radar_snow.name: Show Snow on Radar
radar_snow.description: Display snow coverage on the radar overlay.
